slide1.subtitle: Premium Feta, Halloumi, Greek Yogurt and Mediterranean Products for European Retail & Food Service.

slide2.subtitle: Supplying wholesalers, retailers and food service partners across Europe.

preview.title: Our Mediterranean Heritage
preview.subtitle: About Simos
preview.text1: SIMOS Mediterranean Food specializes in the selection and export of the finest Greek and Mediterranean products. With over 15 years of experience, we connect traditional producers with the European market.
preview.text2: Our commitment to quality and authenticity has made us a trusted partner for wholesalers and retailers across France, Italy, Spain, and Belgium.

page.title: Our Story
page.subtitle: Mediterranean Excellence since 2008
page.legacyText: Founded in 2008 in Athens, SIMOS Mediterranean Food was born from a passion for authentic Greek flavors and a vision to share them with the world. We began as a small family-run export business and have grown into a leading partner for European food service and retail.
page.expertiseText: Our expertise lies in our deep understanding of both the production and distribution sides of the food industry. We work closely with certified Greek producers to ensure that every product meeting our name adheres to the highest standards of quality and authenticity.

Categories.title: Our Product Categories
Categories.subtitle: Discover Our Range
Categories.fetaDesc: Authentic P.D.O. Greek Feta cheese made from sheep and goat milk. Available in various formats for retail and food service.
Categories.halloumiDesc: Traditional Cyprus cheese, perfect for grilling or frying. High-quality production with authentic taste.
Categories.yogurtDesc: Thick, creamy and authentic Greek yogurt. High protein content and traditional straining process.
Categories.olivesDesc: Premium Kalamata and Green olives, harvested at peak ripeness and processed with traditional methods.

Markets.title: Export Markets
Markets.subtitle: Our Presence
Markets.description: We provide localized expertise and reliable supply chains across key European markets.
Markets.pageDescription: Connecting Greek excellence with major European markets through reliable logistics and localized expertise.
Markets.franceDesc: Strong presence in major retail chains and specialized Mediterranean food importers.
Markets.italyDesc: Supplying high-quality Greek yogurt and feta to food service partners across the country.
Markets.spainDesc: Growing network of distributors focusing on authentic Mediterranean products.
Markets.belgiumDesc: Central hub for distribution to Benelux wholesalers and catering companies.
Markets.maritimeDesc: Efficient container shipping for large volume orders.
Markets.roadDesc: Weekly departures to all major European destinations.
Markets.airDesc: Express shipping for fresh and time-sensitive products.

PrivateLabel.title: Private Label Capabilities
PrivateLabel.subtitle: Tailored Solutions
PrivateLabel.description: We offer comprehensive private label services for wholesalers and major retailers. From product selection to packaging design and quality control, we help you bring authentic Mediterranean products to your customers under your own brand.
PrivateLabel.brandDesc: Assistance in packaging and labeling compliant with EU regulations.
PrivateLabel.sourcingDesc: Direct access to certified producers for various product categories.
PrivateLabel.qualityDesc: Rigorous testing and certification to ensure the highest standards.
PrivateLabel.network: Access to a network of certified Greek producers.
PrivateLabel.compliance: Full compliance with European food safety standards.
PrivateLabel.management: End-to-end management from production to delivery.
PrivateLabel.step1Desc: Discuss your brand requirements and product selection.
PrivateLabel.step2Desc: Identify the best producers for your specific needs.
PrivateLabel.step3Desc: Assist in packaging design and labeling compliance.
PrivateLabel.step4Desc: Rigorous quality control during the manufacturing process.

Logistics.title: Logistics & European Distribution
Logistics.subtitle: Efficiency & Reliability
Logistics.description: Our advanced logistics network ensures that our products reach European markets in optimal condition. We manage the entire supply chain from the production facility in Greece to your warehouse door.
Logistics.tempDesc: Modern fleet ensuring cold chain integrity.
Logistics.timeDesc: Regular weekly departures to major European hubs.
Logistics.trackDesc: Full visibility of your shipment from start to finish.
Logistics.coldChainDesc: We specialize in temperature-controlled logistics, ensuring that chilled and frozen products like Feta and Greek yogurt maintain their quality and safety throughout the journey.
Logistics.regComplianceDesc: Our team handles all necessary export documentation and ensures full compliance with EU food safety regulations and labeling requirements for each destination country.
Logistics.flexVolumeDesc: Whether you require full truckloads (FTL) or smaller groupage shipments (LTL), we provide flexible solutions tailored to your inventory needs.
Logistics.stratHubsDesc: With strategic partners in France, Italy, and Spain, we offer efficient local distribution from regional warehouses.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.subtitle: Connect with our team of export specialists to discuss how we can support your business.
Contact.name: Full Name
Contact.subject: Subject
Contact.infoDesc: We are available for inquiries regarding wholesale, retail distribution, and private label opportunities.
Contact.ctaTitle: Ready to Expand Your Mediterranean Range?
Contact.ctaDesc: Connect with our export team today to request our full product catalogue and discuss partnership opportunities.
